message:
docs(heredoc): fix incorrect capture group comments in regex definitions

- Updated comments for INLINE_SCRIPT_SINGLE_QUOTE and INLINE_SCRIPT_DOUBLE_QUOTE
  to correctly document all 4 capture groups including the optional "js" suffix
- Also includes UTF-8 safety fix for command truncation in hook.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
